backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no implemented logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing a logo replacement feature affecting frontend/src/App.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-written summaries describing the main frontend files, branding styles, Tailwind config, and HTML metadata.
frontend/index.css: Defines extensive CSS variables for theme colors and component styling using OKLCH, plus base Tailwind layers.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO metadata and root div for mounting the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: React landing page UI with header, hero, navigation, sections, and smooth-scrolling logic using the new logo asset.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages a backend actor instance based on the user's Internet Identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and provider for Internet Identity handling login, logout, and identity restoration via Dfinity AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: UNICO‑themed Tailwind CSS variables and utility classes including navy and gold brand colors and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App bootstrap that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, global styles, and renders the App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors from CSS variables, custom radii, animations, and plugin integrations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking features, assets, logo‑replacement requirements, and project configuration.
